Headline: #77 Belmont |Temporary Eastbound Reroute near Lakeshore/Diversey
ShortDescription: Eastbound  77 Belmont buses are temporarily rerouted via Belmont, Sheridan, Cannon Drive, Lakeshore West and Diversey: due to, street blockage near Diversey.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #77 Belmont buses are temporarily rerouted via Belmont, Sheridan, Cannon Drive, Lakeshore West and Diversey: due to, street blockage near Diversey.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #44 Wallace/Racine Temporary Reroute at Wallace/35th
ShortDescription: #44 Wallace/Racine buses are temp. rerouted in both directions via 35th, Halsted, 31st, Wallace and over regular route due to construction near Wallace/35th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#44 Wallace/Racine buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 35th, Halsted, 31st, Wallace, then will resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near Wallace/35th.

Headline: Blue Line Experiencing Delays; Boarding change between LaSalle and Grand
ShortDescription: Blue Line service running w/delays due to a medical emergency at Jackson; board trains on the OH-bound side at LaSalle, Monroe, Washington, Clark/Lake & Grand

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line service is running with delays due to a medical emergency a Jackson.

Trains, in both directions, are running on the same track between LaSalle and Grand stations.

  • Board/exit all trains on the O'Hare-bound side at LaSalle, Monroe, Washington, Clark/Lake & Grand/ Milwaukee stations.

As a result of the delay, trains will continue to bypass Jackson station.

Also, consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines. These may include these buses and rail lines: #62 Archer buses and Red Line trains. 

We're working to restore normal service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.
